summary: Frontend-only testing of BO Health & Wellness App light mode redesign completed. Successfully verified: 4 splash intro screens, light mode theme across all screens, login flow, home page redesign with BO logo and green quote card, green bottom tab bar, and logout functionality. CRITICAL BUG FOUND: Smart Menu diet plan selection not displaying meals despite backend API working correctly.

ui_bugs.component: Smart Menu - Diet Plan Meal Display
ui_bugs.issue: When selecting a diet plan (e.g., Keto), meals do not display. UI continues to show 'Select a diet plan above' empty state even after plan selection. Backend API verified working (curl test shows meals returned correctly). Frontend may not be handling API response or state update properly.
reproduction_steps: 3. Click on any diet plan chip (Keto, Mediterranean, Vegan, etc.)
4. Observe: Empty state message persists, no meals displayed
5. Expected: Meal cards should display with images, nutrition info, and Log buttons
ui_bugs.evidence: Screenshots 13_menu_tab.png, 14_menu_keto_selected.png, 20_menu_before_keto.png, 21_menu_keto_meals.png, 22_menu_keto_meals_scrolled.png all show 'Select a diet plan above' message
ui_bugs.backend_verification: Backend API /api/diet-plans/keto returns correct response with plan object and meals array (verified via curl)

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: Smart Menu - Debug why diet plan selection is not displaying meals. Check: (1) selectPlan function is being called, (2) API response is received, (3) setMeals state update is working, (4) FlatList is rendering with meals data
VERIFY: Quick Add Water button functionality - initial test showed no water value change, needs deeper investigation
TEST: Quick Add Breakfast/Lunch/Dinner buttons were not tested
TEST: Post creation in Community Feed (only UI verified, not actual posting)
TEST: AI Coach message sending (only UI verified, not actual chat interaction)
critical_code_review_comments: Light mode theme successfully implemented across all screens (white background #FFFFFF, dark text #1A1A1A, green accent #26B50F)
Splash intro screens properly implemented with AsyncStorage state management
All testID attributes present on interactive elements
Green bottom tab bar correctly styled with rounded top corners
Home page redesign matches requirements: BO logo top-left, green quote card, centered Quick Add section
Logout functionality correctly clears AsyncStorage and returns to splash screen
ISSUE: Smart Menu meal loading broken - frontend code expects data.meals which matches backend response structure, but meals not rendering

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Most features working, 1 critical bug in Smart Menu meal display

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing data from iteration_1.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light mode redesign successfully implemented. All UI elements updated to white background with dark text and green accents. Splash screens working correctly. CRITICAL BUG: Smart Menu diet plan selection not displaying meals - needs main agent to debug and fix. Backend API verified working. After fix, retest Smart Menu meal display and Quick Add buttons.

splash_screens.details: 4 splash screens display correctly with white background, food images in rounded cards, white text overlay, green pagination dots (active dot is green #26B50F, inactive dots are light gray), green next arrow button (circular, 56x56), Skip button with dark text

login_screen.details: White/light gray background (rgb(242, 242, 242)), dark text, BO logo (green and lime colors), green Sign In button, proper contrast

home_screen.details: White background, BO logo top-left with 'for your health on the go' tagline, greeting with user name, green quote card with white text, centered Quick Add section with 4 buttons (Water, Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner) with colored icons, daily stats cards (Water, Calories, Meals), macros card, all in light mode

menu_tab.details: Light mode design correct: white background, dark text, diet plan chips with light gray background (active chip has green background), but meal display not working

feed_tab.details: Light mode design: white background, dark text, green submit button, post cards with light gray background

coach_tab.details: Light mode design: white background, dark text, green user message bubbles, light gray AI response bubbles

profile_tab.details: Light mode design: white background, dark text, green circular avatar, green accent colors for chips (goals, dietary preferences), stats cards with light gray background

bottom_tab_bar.details: Green background (#26B50F), white icons and text, rounded top corners (20px), 5 tabs (Home, Menu, Feed, Coach, Profile), proper elevation/shadow

tests: Last slide next button goes to login ✓
Login screen renders in light mode ✓
Redirects to home screen after login ✓
No error messages on successful login ✓
Water value update unclear (showed 250ml before and after) ⚠
Diet plan chips in light mode ✓
Selecting plan shows meals ✗ CRITICAL BUG

mobile_design_review.spacing: Proper 8pt grid spacing observed (8px, 16px, 24px, 32px) throughout the app
mobile_design_review.touch_targets: All buttons appear to meet minimum 44x44 points requirement
mobile_design_review.contrast: Excellent contrast in light mode - dark text (#1A1A1A) on white background (#FFFFFF)
mobile_design_review.color_scheme: Consistent use of green accent (#26B50F), white backgrounds, dark text, light gray surfaces (#F5F5F5)
mobile_design_review.branding: BO logo displays correctly with green and lime colors, tagline visible
mobile_design_review.navigation: Bottom tab navigation working correctly with green tab bar
mobile_design_review.typography: Clear hierarchy with proper font sizes (H1: 32px, H2: 24px, H3: 20px, Body: 16px)
mobile_design_review.cards_and_surfaces: Proper use of light gray backgrounds (#F5F5F5) for cards with subtle borders (#E0E0E0)

console_warnings: shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow
